feedbackSurvey.title: Help shape MonkeyTravel
feedbackSurvey.subtitle: You've planned real trips with us. 30 seconds of honest feedback would mean a lot.
feedbackSurvey.q1Label: What do you actually use MonkeyTravel for?
feedbackSurvey.q1Placeholder: e.g. day-by-day itineraries, finding restaurants, sharing plans with friends...
feedbackSurvey.q2Label: What almost made you stop using it?
feedbackSurvey.q2Placeholder: Be honest. The annoying part is the most useful thing you can tell us.
feedbackSurvey.q3Label: Where did you book your last trip?
feedbackSurvey.q3Placeholder: Booking.com, Airbnb, direct with the hotel, a travel agent...
feedbackSurvey.q4Label: Would you book a trip through MonkeyTravel if you could?
feedbackSurvey.chatLabel: Open to a quick 5-minute chat to help shape the product? Leave your email.
feedbackSurvey.thanksBody: This is worth more than you know. We read every single one.
feedbackSurvey.error: Something went wrong — please try again.
feedbackSurvey.disclosurePrefix: By sending, you agree we may use your answers to improve MonkeyTravel. If you leave your email, we'll only use it to contact you about this. See our
feedbackSurvey.linkExpiredBody: No worries — open MonkeyTravel and you can still share your feedback from your trips page.

startOver.tip: Tip: discarded trips are archived for 7 days — reach out if you change your mind.

savedHero.aiDescription: This itinerary was created by AI and enriched with real-time data from Google Places. Photos, ratings, and price levels are verified, but we recommend double-checking opening hours and availability before your trip. Click "More" on any activity to see verified details and photos.

explore.metaDescription: Discover inspiring travel itineraries shared by the MonkeyTravel community. Browse trending destinations, copy trips, and start planning your next adventure.
explore.lede: Real itineraries shared by travelers. Save the ones you like, or fork any trip as a starting point for your own.
explore.heroSubtitle: Real itineraries shared by travelers. Save the ones you love, or fork any trip as a head start for your own.
explore.comingSoon: The community feed is coming soon. In the meantime, plan your own trip — it's free and takes less than a minute.
explore.beTheFirstToPublish: Be the first to publish a trip matching these filters — or clear them and explore what others have shared.

messages.greeting: Hi! 👋 I'm your AI travel assistant. Where would you like to go?
messages.userRequest: I want to visit Barcelona for 5 days!
messages.aiResponse: Great choice! 🇪🇸 Barcelona is amazing. Let me ask a few questions to personalize your trip...

messages.userRequest: Can you add a food tour after Park Güell?
messages.aiResponse: Of course! 🍴 I'll add the "Barcelona Food Tour" at 12:30 PM, right after Park Güell...
messages.success: Done! I've adjusted the times for you.

aiModify.inputPlaceholder: Ask AI to modify your plan...

referral.title: Invite Friends, Get Free Trips
referral.subtitle: Give 1 trip, get 1 trip for each friend

steps.step1: Share your unique link with friends
steps.step2: They sign up and create their first trip
steps.step3: You both get 1 free AI trip!

share.twitterText: I've been using MonkeyTravel to plan amazing AI-powered trips! Join me and get a FREE trip when you sign up:
share.whatsappText: Hey! I've been using MonkeyTravel to plan amazing trips with AI. Join me and we both get a FREE trip!
share.emailSubject: You're invited to MonkeyTravel - Get a FREE AI trip!
share.emailBody:
Hey!

I've been using MonkeyTravel to plan amazing trips with AI, and I thought you'd love it too.

Join using my link and we'll both get a FREE AI-generated trip!

Happy travels!

meta.title: Curated Escapes
meta.description: Discover hand-picked travel itineraries crafted by travel experts. Browse curated trips to Paris, Tokyo, Barcelona, and more destinations worldwide.

welcome.title: Welcome to the Trip!
welcome.description: You've been invited to collaborate on this trip. Let's show you how to make the most of it.

voting.title: Vote on Activities
voting.description: Tap any activity to vote with our 4-level system: Love it, Flexible, Concerns, or Skip. Your vote helps the group decide.

proposing.title: Propose Activities
proposing.description: See an empty slot or have a better idea? Propose new activities for the group to vote on.

sharing.title: Invite Travel Companions
sharing.description: Know someone who should join? Share the trip link to invite more collaborators.

invitePage.magicLinkSent: We sent a magic link to {email}. Click it to join the trip!

errors.invalidTokenDesc: This invite link doesn't exist or may have been deleted.
errors.revokedDesc: The trip owner has revoked this invite.
errors.expiredDesc: This invite link has expired. Please ask for a new one.
errors.maxUsesDesc: This invite has already been used. Please ask for a new one.
errors.tripNotFoundDesc: The trip associated with this invite no longer exists.
errors.recipientMismatchDesc: This invite was sent to a specific email address. Sign in with that email to view and accept the invite.

hostelCta.affiliateDisclosure: Affiliate link — we may earn a small commission at no extra cost to you.

calendar.downloadIcsSubtitle: Works with Apple Calendar, Google Calendar, Outlook

concierge.placeholder: Ask anything about your trip — "what's near our Day 3 hotel for dinner?", "how long to Castello di Miramare from the city?"
concierge.liveTripHint: Today is in your trip window — answers ground in today's activities.
concierge.errorQuota: Daily AI limit reached. Try again tomorrow.
concierge.errorGeneric: Couldn't answer right now. Try again in a moment.
concierge.historyEmpty: No questions yet — your past chats with the concierge will show up here.
concierge.historyError: Couldn't load history. Try again in a moment.

expenses.title: Trip expenses
expenses.errorAmountRequired: Enter an amount greater than zero.
expenses.errorAddFailed: Couldn't add the expense — try again.
expenses.errorDeleteFailed: Couldn't delete the expense — try again.
expenses.errorLoadFailed: Could not load expenses. Try again.

settle.title: Settle Up
settle.subtitleCount: {count, plural, =1 {# transfer to close out} other {# transfers to close out}}
settle.emptyHint: Every balance on this trip is even. Nice work.

payments.recipientHasNoHandles: Recipient hasn't set payment handles. Ask them to add one in Settings.
payments.recipientHandlesInvalid: Recipient's payment handles aren't valid. Ask them to update them in Settings.

settings.title: Payment handles
settings.description: Save your PayPal, Venmo, and Wise usernames so trip mates can pay you back with one tap from the Settle Up view.
settings.errorLoadFailed: Could not load your payment handles. Try again.
settings.errorInvalidHandle: That doesn't look like a valid handle for this provider.
settings.errorFixBeforeSave: Fix the highlighted handle before saving.

help.paypal: Your PayPal.me username — the part after paypal.me/ in your link. Letters, numbers, dots, dashes, underscores.
help.venmo: Your Venmo username — the part after @ in your Venmo handle. 5-30 characters.
help.wise: Your Wise (TransferWise) username, e.g. @alyssaperez. Make sure 'Get paid' is enabled in your Wise account.

settings.privacyNote: Only trip members you share an expense with can see these handles. We never see or process the payments — links open the provider's app directly.

publishToExplore.title: Publish to Explore
publishToExplore.subtitle: Share your trip with the community
publishToExplore.disclosure1Pre: Your trip appears in the public
publishToExplore.disclosure2: Anyone can view, save, or copy ("fork") it as a starting point
publishToExplore.disclosure3: You can unpublish anytime from the same toggle
publishToExplore.authorNameHelp: How you'll be credited on the explore card. {count}/{max}
publishToExplore.notePlaceholder: e.g., Honeymoon in May, prioritized hidden gems and slow mornings
publishToExplore.noteHelp: A short blurb shown under the title. {count}/{max}

addFromEmail.placeholder: Paste your booking confirmation here — flight, hotel, restaurant reservation, anything with a date and time.
addFromEmail.errorTooShort: That doesn't look like a booking confirmation — paste the whole email and try again.
addFromEmail.errorParseFailed: Couldn't parse this email. Make sure it's a booking confirmation.
addFromEmail.errorNoBooking: We couldn't find a booking in that email. Try pasting the full confirmation.

pack_early_14d.heading: Two weeks to go
pack_early_14d.body: Your {destination} trip is two weeks away. A great time to make sure your passport is valid, draft your packing list, and lock in any flights or hotels you've been eyeing.

visa_check_7d.heading: One week out — visa check
visa_check_7d.body: Heads up: your {destination} trip is in seven days. Now's the moment to double-check visa, vaccination, or entry-form requirements so nothing surprises you at the airport.

weather_3d.heading: Three days to {destination}
weather_3d.body: Trip in three days. Peek at the weather, finalise your packing, and confirm transport to the airport. We've got your itinerary ready when you need it.

confirm_1d.heading: Tomorrow — final checks
confirm_1d.body: You leave for {destination} tomorrow. Quick checklist: boarding passes downloaded, accommodations confirmed, chargers packed, passport on you. Have an amazing trip.

morning_of.heading: Travel day
morning_of.body: Today's the day. Your full {destination} itinerary is one tap away — open it whenever you need directions, opening hours, or what's next.

optIn.title: Stay in the loop?
optIn.body: Get notified when collaborators add activities, vote on your trip, or your departure date is near. Only when something needs you — no spam.

savedPage.title: Saved trips
savedPage.description: Trips you bookmarked while signed in.
savedPage.descriptionAnon: Trips you bookmarked on this device. Sign in to sync across devices.
savedPage.comingSoon: Saved trips are coming soon. Check back shortly!
savedPage.loadError: We couldn't load your saved trips — please try again.

empty.title: Nothing saved yet
empty.body: Browse Explore and tap the bookmark on any trip to save it here.

anonNudge.label: Heads up:
anonNudge.body: these saves live on this device only. Create a free account to sync them across your phone and laptop.

publicTrip.metaDescriptionFallback: A detailed day-by-day travel itinerary for {destination}, planned on MonkeyTravel.

creator.metaDescription: Explore {count} travel itineraries created by {name} on MonkeyTravel.
creator.emptyState: This traveler has not published any public trips yet.
